comment: R0 quarantine measured by the deterministic Observatory on 2026-07-16. A generated law remains modeled, but accepted-only must use source fallback until its named geometric finding is closed.

arrow-down-circle/outline.reason: at least one declared target raster reports component or counter divergence, while the adaptive topology oracle remains uncertain
arrow-down-circle/outline.exitCriteria: make every target raster topology match and obtain a resolved adaptive-oracle match

arrow-forward-circle/outline.reason: at least one declared target raster reports component or counter divergence, while the adaptive topology oracle remains uncertain
arrow-forward-circle/outline.exitCriteria: make every target raster topology match and obtain a resolved adaptive-oracle match

ban/outline.reason: the adaptive topology oracle cannot resolve the normalized law against the historical hand; no topology difference is claimed
ban/outline.exitCriteria: obtain a resolved topology match before owner review of the remaining subpixel normalization

bulb/outline.reason: the adaptive topology oracle cannot resolve the analytic dome and meniscus against the historical negative space; no difference is claimed
bulb/outline.exitCriteria: encode the intended counter law and obtain a resolved topology match at all declared masters

chevron-up-circle/filled.reason: the rotated canonical construction diverges in at least one target-raster topology sample
chevron-up-circle/filled.exitCriteria: remove the raster topology divergence without breaking rotational family identity

component/filled.reason: the fourfold-symmetric reconstruction diverges in at least one target-raster sample and remains uncertain in the adaptive oracle
component/filled.exitCriteria: preserve fourfold symmetry while obtaining target-raster parity and a resolved adaptive-oracle match

component/outline.reason: the fourfold-symmetric reconstruction diverges in at least one target-raster sample and remains uncertain in the adaptive oracle
component/outline.exitCriteria: preserve fourfold symmetry while obtaining target-raster parity and a resolved adaptive-oracle match

filter/outline.reason: capsule normalization exceeds the automatic silhouette acceptance threshold
filter/outline.exitCriteria: obtain explicit owner acceptance or reduce the geometric deviation below the policy threshold

list/outline.reason: shared row rhythm and capsule terminals exceed the automatic silhouette acceptance threshold
list/outline.exitCriteria: obtain explicit owner acceptance or reduce the geometric deviation below the policy threshold

plus/outline.reason: the adaptive topology oracle cannot resolve the normalized construction against the historical hand; no topology difference is claimed
plus/outline.exitCriteria: obtain a resolved topology match before evaluating the remaining contour normalization

radio/filled.reason: concentric normalization exceeds the automatic silhouette acceptance threshold
radio/filled.exitCriteria: obtain explicit owner acceptance or reduce the geometric deviation below the policy threshold

radio/outline.reason: the adaptive topology oracle cannot resolve the concentric ring reconstruction against historical negative space; no difference is claimed
radio/outline.exitCriteria: obtain a resolved ring and center topology match at analysis and target raster sizes

reload/filled.reason: concentric orbit and terminal correction exceeds the automatic silhouette acceptance threshold
reload/filled.exitCriteria: obtain explicit owner acceptance or reduce the geometric deviation below the policy threshold
